programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl Allen is stuck in a rut with his negative ways. He goes to a self-help seminar and learns to unleash the power of yes. Living in the affirmative leads him to all sorts of transforming experiences; he gets a job promotion and even finds a new romance. But Carl finds that too much of anything, even positive thinking, is not necessarily a good thing.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: When timid bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss (Jim Carrey) discovers a magical mask containing the spirit of the Norse god Loki, his entire life changes. While wearing the mask, Ipkiss becomes a supernatural playboy exuding charm and confidence which allows him to catch the eye of local nightclub singer Tina Carlyle (Cameron Diaz). Unfortunately, under the mask's influence, Ipkiss also robs a bank, which angers junior crime lord Dorian Tyrell (Peter Greene), whose goons get blamed for the heist.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: When timid bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss (Jim Carrey) discovers a magical mask containing the spirit of the Norse god Loki, his entire life changes. While wearing the mask, Ipkiss becomes a supernatural playboy exuding charm and confidence which allows him to catch the eye of local nightclub singer Tina Carlyle (Cameron Diaz). Unfortunately, under the mask's influence, Ipkiss also robs a bank, which angers junior crime lord Dorian Tyrell (Peter Greene), whose goons get blamed for the heist.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Set against the shores of the Ocean State, The Real Housewives franchise expands into the world of a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have deep community roots and families that go back generations.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: The Higher the Heel, the Closer to God
programme.desc: Kyle's daughter has a carnival-themed birthday party; Kyle's and Adrienne's husbands walk a mile in high heels for charity.

programme.desc: The ladies are having some fun; golf cart race; a mud filled spa; drunken gymnastics; arm wrestling contest.

programme.desc: Taylor invites a psychic into her home; a lawsuit doesn't go in Taylor's favor; Brandi confronts the woman who her ex-husband had an affair with; Scheana picks up shifts at Lisa's restaurant.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Jo-Ellen and Rosie clash over rumors about Kelsey's unconventional relationship; new to Rhode Island, Ashley learns to fit in with a group of friends whose history runs deep; small town secrets come to the surface at Jo-Ellen's Fourth of July party.

programme.desc: Business pressure and affair rumors send the girls to Newport for a tense wine-fueled face-off.

programme.desc: With her grand opening approaching, Kelli finds herself under fire as accusations surface from multiple directions; Drew makes her return to the silver screen and slips up about what's really been happening.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past ... or each other.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: With her grand opening approaching, Kelli finds herself under fire as accusations surface from multiple directions; Drew makes her return to the silver screen and slips up about what's really been happening.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programme.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past ... or each other.

programme.title: Ladies of London: The New Reign
programme.desc: The ladies trade the bustle of London for a lavish retreat at the magnificent Longleat House, anticipating a weekend of elegance, adventure and indulgence; the calm of the countryside soon begins to fray, however, as long-simmering tensions between Margo and Mark-Francis resurface, threatening to turn their refined escape into an uncomfortable clash.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Brittany takes the first step toward regaining her self-confidence with a mommy makeover consultation; Jasmine's growing friendship with Lala is tested on a girls' night out, leaving Michelle in the middle.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Joel Kim Booster and Mia Calabrese.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Host Andy Cohen welcomes guests from some of television's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Cameoke: "I Got a New One"; Nick Offerman; "Epic Story Time"; Aaron Tveit; Dav Pilkey; Dasha performs; WIL: Anthony Davis.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Dad Denied Me Until He Died; Unlock: I Think You're Cheating With My Family Member
programme.desc: Adopted Yvette connected with Tiffiny, who could be her sister, but the man Yvette believed was her father denied her until his dying day; Jervaris caught his boyfriend, Jo'Rico, on a dating app, messaging someone in his own family.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: Faye joins Mercury Yacht Mercury as chief stew with experience from all over the world as a former businesswoman, but when she finds out her team of stews know each other, she worries how their past will serve the interior.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: The first adventure of the season sends the charter on a caving expedition, but it's Kyle who ends up digging himself into a hole by flirting with Kasie in front of guests.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: Lewis warns Kyle that his bad behavior has Captain Kerry on high alert; when the Mercury engines fail, Kerry has to rely on his young deck crew to execute a precarious docking.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: As the Mercury team prepares for their next charter, Capt. Kerry notifies the crew he asked Kyle to resign; pressures rise for both the interior and exterior team as they are drowning in extra duties; Capt. Kerry lends a hand to the deck crew.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: After Jess burns herself, Captain Kerry lends a hand to prepare a five-star picnic for the guests' excursion; Nathan leads guests on an epic biking adventure; Lewis faces the pressure of being a man down for another charter.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: While on anchor watch, Nathan goes to bed before handing the shift over, leaving the boat unattended; in the galley, Oriana struggles to keep up with the pace of breakfast; a misstep leaves the exterior at risk of losing yet another deckhand.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: The battle between the teams continues when Mike misses a call; Jess experiments with a dessert she's never made before; communication issues cause problems on deck for Lewis just as his new deckhand arrives; Faye sets her sights on the new guy.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: New deckhand Seth finds cracks within the leadership of his department and claims he could run it better; a plate mix-up causes problems at a viking Oktoberfest-themed dinner; Faye takes the guests paragliding.

programme.title: Below Deck Adventure
programme.desc: Faye orders the team back to the picnic field to fulfill the guests' request for an afternoon of games; Lewis triumphs with an obstacle course; Seth approaches Cap. Kerry about replacing Lewis; the crew is rewarded with an adventure.
